$comment: Bundled catalog of gstack skills (github.com/garrytan/gstack), grouped by the sprint pipeline Think → Plan → Design → Review → Test → Ship → Document → Reflect. Each skill `id` is the slash-command name WITHOUT the leading slash or any install prefix; the UI builds the actual command as /<prefix><id>. Curated from the gstack docs — edit freely; the UI reloads it on restart.

think.label: Think
think.blurb: Turn fuzzy intent into a sharp, executable spec.

plan.label: Plan
plan.blurb: Pressure-test scope and architecture before a line is built.

design.label: Design
design.blurb: Build the look and feel, then turn mockups into code.

review.label: Review
review.blurb: Staff-level code review, debugging and independent audits.

test.label: Test
test.blurb: Verify it actually works — functionally, securely, fast.

ship.label: Ship
ship.blurb: Get it to production safely and watch the landing.

document.label: Document
document.blurb: Keep the docs honest and complete.

reflect.label: Reflect
reflect.blurb: Learn from the sprint and bank the patterns.

utilities.label: Utilities & Safety
utilities.blurb: Browser control, edit guards and gstack maintenance.

skills.name: Office Hours
skills.desc: Product interrogation with forcing questions; writes a design doc the plan reviews pick up.

skills.name: Spec
skills.desc: Turn a vague intent into an executable specification.

skills.name: Autoplan
skills.hint: the feature or change to plan
skills.desc: Fully reviewed plan in one shot: CEO → design → eng.

skills.name: CEO Review
skills.desc: Strategic scope challenge with four modes — is this worth building?

skills.name: Eng Review
skills.desc: Architecture lock-in with diagrams; writes a test plan QA picks up.

skills.name: Design Review (plan)
skills.desc: Audit the plan across every design dimension.

skills.name: DevEx Review (plan)
skills.desc: Interactive review of developer experience in the plan.

skills.name: Design Consultation
skills.desc: Build a design system from scratch.

skills.name: Design Shotgun
skills.desc: Generate 4–6 visual mockup variants to choose from.

skills.name: Design → HTML
skills.desc: Convert chosen mockups into production code.

skills.name: Review
skills.desc: Staff-engineer code review; auto-fixes obvious issues.

skills.name: Investigate
skills.desc: Systematic root-cause debugging.

skills.name: Design Review
skills.desc: Designer-coded audit of the running UI, with atomic commits.

skills.name: DevEx Review
skills.desc: Live developer-onboarding audit.

skills.name: Codex
skills.desc: Independent OpenAI review (three modes).

skills.name: QA
skills.desc: Browser-based testing that also fixes the bugs it finds.

skills.name: QA (report only)
skills.desc: Browser testing that reports bugs without changing code.

skills.name: Security Audit
skills.desc: Security audit across OWASP + STRIDE.

skills.name: Benchmark
skills.desc: Performance baseline against Core Web Vitals.

skills.name: Ship
skills.desc: Sync tests, audit coverage, and open a PR.

skills.name: Land & Deploy
skills.desc: Merge, deploy and verify in production.

skills.name: Canary
skills.desc: Post-deploy error and performance monitoring.

skills.name: Document Release
skills.desc: Auto-update all project docs for a release.

skills.name: Generate Docs
skills.desc: Create missing Diataxis documentation.

skills.name: Retro
skills.desc: Weekly engineering retrospective.

skills.name: Learn
skills.desc: Manage persistent project patterns gstack remembers.

skills.name: Browse
skills.hint: what to do in the browser
skills.desc: Drive Chromium with real clicks.

skills.name: Careful
skills.desc: Warn before destructive commands.

skills.name: Freeze
skills.desc: Lock edits to a single directory.

skills.name: Guard
skills.desc: Combined safety: careful + freeze.

skills.name: Unfreeze
skills.desc: Remove an edit lock.

skills.name: Setup gBrain
skills.desc: Stand up a persistent knowledge base.

skills.name: Sync gBrain
skills.desc: Keep the codebase indexed in the brain.

skills.name: Upgrade gstack
skills.desc: Self-update gstack to the latest version.
